Dear Friend, The Supreme Court issued two significant rulings this week. In the first, the Court found 6-3 that the Civil Rights Act of 1964 protects LGBTQ people from workplace discrimination. Almost 51 years after the Stonewall Inn uprising, the rights and protections under the law of LGBTQ people are more settled than ever. The second ruling on Trump's intended recission of DACA protections is less definitive. This ruling found that the administration did not comply with the Administrative Procedure Act by not providing adequate reason for its action. While temporarily protected, it leaves DACA recipients in a state of limbo, waiting for Congress to act to codify their rights and status in law. The two rulings demonstrate the best and the worst features of our governing institutions. The first shows that even a conservative Supreme Court is reluctant to issue a ruling that defies overwhelming public opinion. The second shows how a dysfunctional Congress can leave the fate of over a million people to the whims of the executive branch for decades. We don't vote for Supreme Court justices, but we do vote for our representative in Congress. As your representative I'll do everything I can to get the Dream Act passed and end the uncertainty for DACA recipients. **[Please pitch in and help me get there](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17942750/211758509/-1907457919?refcode=06202020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFhMmEwNC1mOGIyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXrTaNJCme-zq_fvKAKl8v0QIYnfbI274YTkHYLyws=)**. _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17942751/211758510/1282705599?refcode=06202020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFhMmEwNC1mOGIyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXrTaNJCme-zq_fvKAKl8v0QIYnfbI274YTkHYLyws=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17942752/211758511/1282705599?refcode=06202020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFhMmEwNC1mOGIyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXrTaNJCme-zq_fvKAKl8v0QIYnfbI274YTkHYLyws=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17942753/211758512/1282705599?refcode=06202020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFhMmEwNC1mOGIyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXrTaNJCme-zq_fvKAKl8v0QIYnfbI274YTkHYLyws=)**

body:
President Trump and I are supporting Constitutional conservative Corky Messner in his bid for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Are you in? >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9b18306cc82501aa/f076b39a1a841abdc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I know personally that Democrats will stop at nothing to attack principled, conservative Republicans in their pursuit of more power. That’s why they’re going to be looking at New Hampshire in 2020. They know they have zero chance of flipping the Senate blue if they lose this seat. Thankfully, we have a fantastic candidate to run against leftist Jeanne Shaheen. **I’m glad to join President Trump in endorsing Corky Messner in his bid for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire**. Corky is exactly the kind of Constitutional conservative we need more of in the Senate, and I will be proud to serve with him in the ongoing fight for freedom. I know he will join me to defend our individual liberties, promote fiscal sanity, and take on the Democrats who want the federal government to control every aspect of our lives. **[Will you stand with me today by supporting Corky’s campaign with a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9b18306cc82501aa/cad43361693c90c1c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** He knows that we need more leaders in Washington who will be willing to buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s already served his country nobly in the Army during the Cold War, and due to his background in business, he knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. Corky will stand with myself and President Trump to stop our involvement in endless wars, and take care of our veterans who have sacrificed so much. I also know that he will work with me to support the President in confirming honorable men and women on the bench as federal judges. One of my favorite things about the Granite State is the “Live Free or Die” spirit of independence and liberty. Corky embodies that spirit, and we need him in the Senate, especially during times like these. We need someone who will fight back against Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer, who seem hellbent on making sure every American becomes dependent on Big Government, and who buck President Trump at every turn. **[Corky will be an important colleague for myself and a crucial ally for President Trump. Will you help us take back this seat for the GOP and keep our majority in the Senate?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9b18306cc82501aa/332566f8f238bc5ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We have some great momentum already, but we need to keep it going if we want a shot at winning this for the GOP. subject: June is a month for dreams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
**_June is a month for dreams._** It feels so right that today is the Poor People's March and yesterday was Juneteenth, the day celebrating the end of slavery (which my husband's company actually recognized this year as a holiday!) _This June is surely the time to take a stern look at where our country has been headed and to change course as quickly as possible. _ We have seen the huge income inequality in this country soar yet more, with millions of low-paid workers losing both jobs and health care benefits during the pandemic. We have faced horrific video evidence of racial injustice, occurring time and again, and confronting us with how much discrimination occurs when the cameras are off. We have heard the voices raised in every corner of this country demanding to be heard and to be respected, reminding us of the plea of Langston Hughes: This is why I run for office, despite the gerrymandered districts in Ohio, despite the ridiculous amount of money the Republicans have to spend. I refuse to give up on the dream that is America. The dream that Martin Luther King Jr. marched for and died for. The dream that countless soldiers sacrificed their lives for. Everyone in this country deserves a chance to succeed and to have their voices heard, no matter their race, no matter their income. **I hope you won 't leave anything undone this year in the effort to make this the America we all deserve. As has been said -- _If not us, who? If not now, when?_** Thank you, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/4whUaYus-oVYlhWLNmo494u3dQZiiYk7zm3nT86Hv0s=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/qFRJqtqZtwHp9D1J9FHbWHMnJLUjn9Nh2tUgSBjLoiI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/3tLvG9HpS6r4xNWWIu49Vf3ePb4oiCBcR0jGA7qf9WQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/MrZoYZyq4dvK5IjGR7QOcZiPUhaBWOr1CT8Lw-oMYTU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/L3n7YzKtjEBvyJNxyWnyw7NIDUzv19PK7zJochpQ2Zs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ysIi8NJsoVXqFqfaRwpFouQuiYPPizbQT-9gunSvk=/tFv9iQECMvAUMD3-faz7Ck2pOcZVxQUKWTg7aIZDA3s=?refcode=6.20email)

subject: My biggest risk” – President Trump

| | Friend,

This week, Trump discussed how mail-in voting fraud will be the greatest threat to his re-election. Radicalized leftist organizations are hard at work in every state to exploit the weaknesses of our electoral process: Actively promoting the registration and mobilization of unqualified voters, harvesting mail-in ballots that have been fraudulently collected, lobbying for same-day voter registration, no voter ID requirements, non-citizen voting - and engaging in outright data manipulation. President Trump’s campaign has begun a multimillion-dollar legal effort to block this election manipulation, but lawsuits alone won’t be enough.
"My biggest risk is that we don’t win lawsuits," Trump said. "We have many lawsuits going all over. And if we don’t win those lawsuits, I think — I think it puts the election at risk."
True the Vote is fighting for voters in court, too, and these fights are essential, but the judiciary has become so politicized that lawsuits can only slow the spread of election corruption.
We the People MUST engage by working in the election process.
True the Vote is leading an effort to MOBILIZE A MILLION election workers. This is a HUGE goal, but TOGETHER we can do it! We are actively recruiting and training volunteers - and WE NEED YOU. Can you contribute now to fund our efforts?

name: Tina Smith
subject: I need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
If there is one thing I know for certain, it’s that this grassroots team is nothing short of incredible. I can’t begin to thank you enough for your support, especially over the last few days. After missing our fundraising goal this week, we officially closed the gap and hit our target last night thanks to folks like you who chipped in to help our campaign make up for this temporary lapse. Now, our campaign is back on track for the most important FEC deadline of the election so far. **I can’t thank you enough.** In a few short days, my team and I will huddle to discuss our priorities and strategy for the final months of this election. But before we do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important to me that I get your feedback too. **[Will you take a minute to tell me what issues matter most to you in this race? I want to know what your priorities are and what keeps you up at night, so I really hope you’ll take a moment to fill out my survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17946724/211836016/653980566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFmOTg3Zi0xM2IzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyOS3GBCDI6RVTmW9J56R0tDaiahpwik3_fORPMTUNc=&emci=531f987f-13b3-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=541f987f-13b3-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17946725/211836017/653980566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFmOTg3Zi0xM2IzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyOS3GBCDI6RVTmW9J56R0tDaiahpwik3_fORPMTUNc=&emci=531f987f-13b3-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=541f987f-13b3-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:

She has committed to supporting the Equality Act, which is more important than ever given the Trump Administration's attacks on healthcare for LGBTQ Americans. **[This Pride Month will you join me in supporting Rita's campaign by making a $10 donation today? name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Gearing up for summer
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the highlights from this past week:
---
| | |
---|---
|
PHASE 3

We aren't ready to start Phase 3 of our reopening yet, but I want to give you an idea of what the rules will look like when we get there, particularly around social gatherings. In Phase 3, indoor social gatherings should be no more than 50 to 75 people. Outdoor social gatherings should be no more than 75 to 150 people. Please understand that these ranges still represent a wide spread of risk; you should try to hold your event to the lower limit in order to keep yourself and your guests safe.

You can see more of our Phase 3 guidance on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ3hiY-mF2_e7sLQlQOeiQ51l5xQcazVUw7SnKjtHSnDiYHJc955lBQ4SFZ5E6GS8vnPtKQXeSV6WiDC_Gtc0qdvnMCiq5JO58g==&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==).
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOLS

In order to put the health and safety of our children first, we're asking schools to prepare for three reopening scenarios that will range from limited in-person learning to full in-person learning. Each option will have two different sets of requirements--one for elementary and middle schools and one for high schools.

Full in-person learning, which is what we're aiming for on August 31, is going to require elementary and middle schools to keep kids in stable groups of 30 or fewer and maintaining six feet of distance whenever possible. For our high schools, we're recommending that students stay in stable groups whenever possible, but we recognize that this will be harder to accomplish. In high schools, students and teachers will need to either keep 6 feet of distance or wear cloth face masks whenever they cannot maintain stable groups.

If we start to see concerning trends and need to scale back, we'll move to partial in-person learning, reducing the amount of students in the building at one time. If we need to restrict in-person learning even more, we'll transition to limited-in person learning. This is where we'll prioritize the populations that benefit the most from in-person learning, like our students with differing abilities and multilingual learners. Our full guidance for schools is now available on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ3hiY-mF2_e7sLQlQOeiQ51l5xQcazVUw7SnKjtHSnDiYHJc955lBQ4SFZ5E6GS8vnPtKQXeSV6WiDC_Gtc0qdvnMCiq5JO58g==&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==).
| | |
---|---
|
SUMMER

We want to make sure that every child in Rhode Island has the chance to fully enjoy their summer. I'm excited to announce that Rhode Island public school students will have the opportunity to sign up for what we're calling ['SAIL Courses' through RIDE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ91Y0TqTqN7BjdaHMiNm2o0jjJxjHOJJKgCeaawXVzOa7SWgHLTkF58a1ncdWHPo7fNbX4GDay0_EnUM92lkE83TdqpFv1kn87Ldu4cI9CV6YZQRk9Ljd0x8u5hkyZhWCc6ep9_PMWj9ZzH0n0xmuLFEjHQ-RyQ70Q==&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==). SAIL is a temporary program designed to enhance educational opportunities for our students. The goal is to provide all kids, from pre-K through recent high school graduates, with fun educational opportunities from taking extra-curricular arts classes to earning academic credit.

We also know that many high school and college students need to earn money over the summer. And there's no question that finding a summer job will be more difficult this year because of the pandemic. So, we're creating the COVID-19 Response Youth Summer Jobs Program to support employers who hire Rhode Island youth for summer jobs related to our COVID response. This is being run through the Governor's Workforce Board. More information and applications for employers are available on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ3hiY-mF2_e7sLQlQOeiQ51l5xQcazVUw7SnKjtHSnDiYHJc955lBQ4SFZ5E6GS8vnPtKQXeSV6WiDC_Gtc0qdvnMCiq5JO58g==&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==).
| | |
---|---
|
EQUITY

When it comes to beating COVID-19, every community is different. What works in Exeter may not work in Central Falls. What works in Central Falls may not work in Providence. What works in one neighborhood in Providence may not work in another neighborhood in Providence. In order to effectively fight this virus, we have to be on the ground in every single community.

To keep fighting COVID-19 in every community, we are adding new asymptomatic testing sites. Eligible Rhode Islanders without symptoms will be able to make an appointment at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ-wMMj0UC7zCeg6lkHQCfalPEvIZPvFNNHJJPfNhXSL89FAvTJ5xVzr7T60yZiwM60mobB3a1UgI2cZZa2BJCHo=&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==) and get tested at four Stop & Shop locations across the state. The locations are:

* Manton Ave. in Providence
* West River St. in Providence
* Cottage St. in Pawtucket
* Warwick Ave. in Cranston

| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 1pm.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEnX_X5TgCVleEJWIYGvD-rqO2tRhKj8sXFYLyTwOMCtToFlkDHmZ91Y0TqTqN7Bo3ZzvfSSbf-ZrcP_9VoZjGYXaCEecsgy7WLWn6GNoWC4XDP5wjouEXl6VqS8VYly1uL5uSV1mgBRjHzjzFQD4O997mwG5-pP1_Ot6y1oqKoB6AF_4--tX_aNtgk65uM7jXTC9f6B1qg5-F2fU6UGPf0GHNDValO6reaILOOq7o1eJ4F34D5kN3cUIbn5DEf4krXVB0kk__e0Ywe87p3LwcctNICYPoEZiZ4m8OqYs7_AZhRe1EXWlB5gn7o8ubmakECVqnf5RkOjWhfnXXHXTpzDhKimCWGGKH64g5I1oZ8EX4IGxmo6mDeNWoizqXfxzjbPt9GJW54W1WsQqBYg13KAWL2lC0v1ejXw9d6JrXpWHg9MXyz1npfkAwBSpZ5v&c=hst8D9LMGkXawuXv2XBoA4ABr8Lta7gsHAB5RaLQ6A65E49fwhH6pA==&ch=gOj7CKEbefdN8cUm-15mmY12cLzo-VQW7pNHe1T5UQU14ceS_w7fUA==).

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Your Pressure Worked - No Debt, No Jacob Frey Bailout
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_pressure_worked&n=1)
---
Peter -- Quick update... **Earlier this morning the Minnesota Senate, followed by the House, adjourned sine die. That means the Special Session is over and no legislation can be passed.** The Special Session was called because Walz extended his illegal emergency powers and was forced by state statute to call back the legislature. Our biggest fear was that the Republicans in the Senate would cave to the Democrats and get nothing to show for it. The Special Session started off with a big victory. Finally after months of pressure, the Senate [passed the Munson Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers](http://www.action4liberty.com/senate_votes_to_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_pressure_worked&n=2). Unfortunately, the Democrat controlled House voted it down later that evening. With Walz' powers still intact, we thought there was nothing more needed by the legislature. Any compromise was a failure as long as Walz' illegal powers were still in place. So we asked you to call and email Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka and tell him to stop making deals with the Democrats. And it worked! **They adjourned early this morning with no final deals on bonding debt or the Jacob Frey bailout.** The battle continues on and we aren't ready to crown Senate Republicans as heroes. As long as Governor Walz continues to illegally order businesses to comply with his mandates, we will not rest. Politics is war. The Democrats will go to any depth to advance their socialist agenda. Which means the Republicans in the Senate must stand firm for the principles of freedom and limited government. We've watched Minnesota Republicans cave to the Democrats too many times in the past. So we'll continue putting the pressure on them. Especially Paul Gazelka, who has a Republican primary challenger. Thank you for all you did this week! We were able to avoid the worse scenario. name: Trudi Inslee
subject: My husband, Jay Inslee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The work isn't done -- but the journey is part of the story.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8069%2E868730%2EWUtrDQ) Friend, I've been going through old photos and thinking about how we got to this moment. These photos from Jay's state House campaign in 1990 are some of my favorites. From his early campaigns to now, the boys and I have always been so proud of him. [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8948?t=4&akid=8069%2E868730%2EWUtrDQ) Jay always stands up for what is right -- no matter the personal consequences. His election to the U.S. House in 1992 was so exciting, but Jay knew his time in Congress might be short if he voted for the assault weapons ban in 1994. He was right; it was short. He knew that vote was the right one, and he lost his seat for it. He has never regretted it for a minute -- and I've never been prouder of him. That defeat didn't keep Jay from public service. He ran again and served in Congress from 1999 to 2012 and then became our Governor. Jay has put his heart and soul into serving the people of Washington state. Since Donald Trump was elected, Jay has dedicated himself to protecting us from this dangerous administration, especially over these last few months. [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8948?t=5&akid=8069%2E868730%2EWUtrDQ) Jay responded to the COVID-19 pandemic with the same judgment and compassion I've seen in him since day one. He consulted with health experts to combat our pandemic and community activists to make real change to combat injustice and racism. Jay is committed to working with and for everyone -- that's only proven to be truer this year. Washington state needs Jay's leadership. America needs Jay's leadership. Our state is a beacon of light in dark times for our country, and Jay knows we can build something better together. He's built a life and career on that belief and dedication. I see it every single day. **That's why I hope you'll make a donation to support Jay's re-election right now.[Big change comes from all of us making small investments, and a grassroots donation today is one in support of Jay's leadership and dedication. So please, donate $5 or more today to support Jay's re-election as governor of Washington this fall.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8982?t=6&akid=8069%2E868730%2EWUtrDQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8983?t=7&akid=8069%2E868730%2EWUtrDQ)

name: Team Warner
subject: Weekly Team Warner Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841d2/2776816578/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Team Warner is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate to support every Virginian through this challenging time.

**Here 's just some of what Mark is working on:**
* **[This week, the Senate passed _the Great American Outdoors Act_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841d1/2776816578/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.roanoke.com/news/local/senate-passes-great-american-outdoors-act-conservation-proposal-championed-by-sen-mark-warner/article_10cf558c-7a88-5a35-b523-194da73e3042.html"),** which will support 100,000 jobs across the country (10,000 in Virginia alone), while providing the resources to address maintenance backlog in our national parks. This bill also includes full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF), which was established in 1964 to protect our country's natural beauty and water resources and preserve cultural heritage sites across the country, and which has **never had permanent funding before.** Mark first introduced this legislation three years ago to fix crumbling recreational infrastructure.

| ➪ | **Next step:** The House will vote on this bill before it will go to the President to sign into law.
---|---|---
* Mark joined Tim Kaine in calling for a **[permanent expansion of telehealth access](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841d0/2776816578/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cbs19news.com/story/42254472/warner-kaine-call-for-permanent-expansion-of-telehealth").** During the coronavirus pandemic, telehealth allowed Medicare beneficiaries to receive the care they need without increasing their risk of infection. Mark has long been a supporter of expanding telehealth access, and believes the pandemic underscores the need for increased access to virtual medicine.

* Last week, **[Mark became an original co-sponsor of the _Justice in Policing Act of 2020_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841df/2776816578/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wdbj7.com/content/news/Warner-Kaine-join-forces-with--571111071.html"),** led by Sens. Kamala Harris and Cory Booker. This bill provides common-sense changes to hold police officers who break the law accountable, address unchecked bias, change the culture of law enforcement, and lay the groundwork for trust between law enforcement and our communities. While there is no singular policy solution to correct years of overpolicing and systemic racism, Mark believes this bill is an important first step toward meaningful reform.

All of us on Team Warner hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this difficult time. Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

P.S. You might have noticed that we have a new look. We rolled out [a new campaign website](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841de/2776816578/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/") this week, complete with a [campaign store](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d432/53d9897e/54b1709b/1c8841dd/2776816578/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/"). We'd love it if you checked it out!
|

subject: Re: The world is watching
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zWDN9erKE7KOX-Wp9aJi_os2p4VrEsEVd4D0vpHbiEQ=/6GJ2w37cH8w9ce9cN0zNzplRIUxFqSmRZwoTppVBceE=?refcode=062020)
| | Friend, Early this morning, Minnesota Senate Republicans followed through on their threat to end the special legislative session. They walked away from criminal justice reform and police accountability, addressing COVID-19 and its economic impacts, local jobs and projects, and so much more.
Senate Republicans didn't just quit on their work, they quit on Minnesotans.
This is a moment in history that our counterparts on the other side of the aisle failed to meet. Our work does not stop simply because they walked away from the table. We won't let Republicans' inability to govern derail our efforts to build a Minnesota that is fair for everyone, no exceptions.
If Senate Republicans continue to refuse to meet this moment, we'll do it without them next year with a DFL-controlled Senate. I am asking again: will you please make an investment in our campaign today to protect and expand our majority?

Illinois’s small businesses are facing an increasing number of serious challenges. The COVID-19 pandemic, ensuing government shutdowns, and... [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=495fabe2826d4a538202666bc039e9f6&_e=NwgLu0aKW5xENmPqsftyzWKpPnqYxVA_ZBsDBWJCODPE8DFiGTs-9xaNQAiTTK2ZGm_9AtCOQNk8D6x-lwcG04lF0e8zMkigTo_tgngYF3m7nKUIkym_QFLgoS87zoEEn4O9FrCwpTW4svF3Kkz68uPyI_Hhm-LQF7CznZgnIor_U28lCUDbADht1pH_m9GeRs2bR6_xdhrl4ISTUKavsY9bu0hCdIyBR7vXzWDE29wKtDK_OtTNZbY8AtMw-UJlss9qnYBa4GIRb1755ICLLVhTNuIAz0IK7VEq03xTdsJ7cT8kb4jxhhUZZCcD_4CHQEKt6nHQFxgBljChbyAvy5SW_syWFIC2LGjQ5AoOwmdaMHvf1xjl95wV1yVVwtbMacra2Gd9pcb1b8PbmHwnJ63u6GIK3XMPJF-itddCQsHecls_TSWyq1YAJNTOrHUxhaDw0Mgck-KsfoFaCrU7lXwmhrfQs9eD6INUTNDZstA%3D) | |

Friend,

**Illinois’s small businesses are facing an increasing number of serious challenges.**

The COVID-19 pandemic, ensuing government shutdowns, and Democratic obstruction of small business relief has put them, and Illinois workers, in a hole. We won’t beat around the bush — they’ve hit hard and we need to step up and help them get back on their feet.

Darin is fighting hard on Capitol Hill to get them the support they need — will you fight with him?
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=495fabe2826d4a538202666bc039e9f6&_e=NwgLu0aKW5xENmPqsftyzWKpPnqYxVA_ZBsDBWJCODPE8DFiGTs-9xaNQAiTTK2ZGm_9AtCOQNk8D6x-lwcG04lF0e8zMkigTo_tgngYF3m7nKUIkym_QFLgoS87zoEEn4O9FrCwpTW4svF3Kkz68uPyI_Hhm-LQF7CznZgnIor_U28lCUDbADht1pH_m9GeRs2bR6_xdhrl4ISTUKavsY9bu0hCdIyBR7vXzWDE29wKtDK_OtTNZbY8AtMw-UJlss9qnYBa4GIRb1755ICLLSrnTJhY8A-mwVDnqtcf0iN_-Cq8-pSsujhXWBuEzZkA_-Bq1daTD5vlP3zBQ3L1XLtzwRC_AGseEdeCgwsvMi7r4_e7FRroSCh3xoRqJdFekIyRfYr5ynJg4TV4CMzIFieVMlyTmG1IStHwLe8c-0CBMs-9mVWGhkaK5fIyH0V6lk70oGRy13EfJoU_7AFGyfZ6CC1QtKysWIYxDQcJhKI%3D)
[**Stand with our small businesses**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=495fabe2826d4a538202666bc039e9f6&_e=NwgLu0aKW5xENmPqsftyzWKpPnqYxVA_ZBsDBWJCODPE8DFiGTs-9xaNQAiTTK2ZGm_9AtCOQNk8D6x-lwcG04lF0e8zMkigTo_tgngYF3m7nKUIkym_QFLgoS87zoEEn4O9FrCwpTW4svF3Kkz68uPyI_Hhm-LQF7CznZgnIor_U28lCUDbADht1pH_m9GeRs2bR6_xdhrl4ISTUKavsY9bu0hCdIyBR7vXzWDE29wKtDK_OtTNZbY8AtMw-UJlss9qnYBa4GIRb1755ICLLbxD7c4g89OGFxvHE6raoLHtOeX3SwlcryDgVD_yQVgn54C7jWI6U8rxhPa7ZI0IjqljY6HdFr-kUb2zVT1fFmHvZ1C-YYNJGJx7yRrbT90KqjKpGK6_t8Q5LAm_J3yLoiCAnUoeJ00241z3AuU9a3xdYu3iNRWi_Pc2MtqGo9fhLhzHDmHrChTXButgbiuto1oaXZxdAqzVoZDSeFuAIuA%3D)
Our economy is on the road to recovery and the latest jobs report is a great sign, but we’re not there yet. Illinois’s small businesses need our support as they begin to reopen around the state.

Patronizing your favorite spots safely as Illinois reopens is a good first step, but we’re going to need to have their backs every step of the way as we work to restore our economy.

**Friend, will you stand with Darin as he fights to help our small businesses recover?**
[**Stand with our small businesses**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=495fabe2826d4a538202666bc039e9f6&_e=NwgLu0aKW5xENmPqsftyzWKpPnqYxVA_ZBsDBWJCODPE8DFiGTs-9xaNQAiTTK2ZGm_9AtCOQNk8D6x-lwcG04lF0e8zMkigTo_tgngYF3m7nKUIkym_QFLgoS87zoEEn4O9FrCwpTW4svF3Kkz68uPyI_Hhm-LQF7CznZgnIor_U28lCUDbADht1pH_m9GeRs2bR6_xdhrl4ISTUKavsY9bu0hCdIyBR7vXzWDE29wKtDK_OtTNZbY8AtMw-UJlss9qnYBa4GIRb1755ICLLTbMpygvINMr_HsvvuezkPvrtvBd24pIvI2RFFBz76nP8QbCJRmCCVSZfLLqee1oDQro_Ty4i8ltiawqKrkTr1vVUMGi_xtORv8o3MeybrrPN40PdHMif4xVzyVZ-w92u9xRDshf88rzReXDO7r4PrTPW6O0Bz0HqVSU-wHV7bTr3ytfYIaTBxSd_yWGxaZx87Ig8SaSFrm5JHHi-BLfi_w%3D)
Thank you for your support. We’ll keep you in the loop as we continue our fight to help small businesses and workers across our state and let you know how you can help.

Sincerely,

Team LaHood

friend,

Like the lives of folks across our state, earlier this year our campaign was put on hold.

Governor Holcomb put 100% of his energy behind fighting COVID-19. And -- like Hoosiers -- we stood behind him.

As your Holcomb Crew, we’ve been spending our time helping spread accurate and reliable information, listening to Hoosiers' concerns over the phone or online, and helping Governor Holcomb keep Hoosiers safe and healthy in any way that we can.

But Election Day 2020 is coming no matter what and like the rest of the state, we need to get back to work (safely!). If anything, the last couple of months have taught us how important it is to have a leader who is dedicated to building One Indiana.

_They’ve also taught us that Indiana needs a leader who knows how to bring high-wage, high-demand jobs to Indiana and who has done it before. That we need a leader who knows how to bring Hoosiers together. That we need a steady and experienced leader that we can trust._

**That we need another four years of Governor Holcomb.**

Our 2020 campaign will most likely look a little bit different. While Governor Holcomb and Hoosiers across the state are getting Indiana back on track, there are still many unknowns.

_But we do know that we’ll need your help more than ever. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Our end of quarter deadline is coming up later this month, and we need to pick up right where left off._

**friend, will you chip in any amount using the button below and invest in One Indiana for another four years?**
[**Invest in One Indiana**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d43e21202bc64d75894f2995152f1329&_e=2cYkVFkd2TC40aM5IEaNvIYyUp_lU6rLR24qbKzMogy_BAwsEIaNW1B3QkCN8V8wMK5QXuMHVTQOli9rCp4K68-MTW0u19yJKKziR0fxCPVSrT7oSpCEoCYv4lkY6311g8ZYGdxZsugsPHJL-BPo47Pz9A4-amL0_rIiUApsNSyzwauQ7Nve-uW5-OEk1wX1G-ZjBImFd_Xm4aBxBQhKq07HoA3QkOrBixClk2Zea_mOGBvCRNlo_QfcVHLzuXnYd8fQ_4XQerUZ5xrn-XDoFsCF0UMXScN9Krx-_UK1dDIlsiBRY0o6w8aC7WzBu0q4HiVHT2IFd_LYpY_0TGpwcgKOsUR0Rs6X7jI7TF7l-wz8ubMhosRX3v5hiXoHICqkbSKqGcX6zdhat7f99NkzdaZyo8vNM-ckvBgIAi2BrUU%3D)
_We know that times are tough for a lot of Hoosiers because of COVID-19, and we don’t want you to give unless you have the means._

If you are able to give, we’d love to have your support.

Thank you for everything you do,
-Your Holcomb Crew

subject: Bill Barr should resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Last night, we got two pieces of breaking news.

The first: a press release from Attorney General Bill Barr stating that the U.S. Attorney in the Southern District of New York, Geoffrey Berman, was resigning.

The second: a press release from Berman himself saying this news took him by surprise and that he had **"no intention of resigning."

Then, this afternoon, Barr said President Trump decided to fire Geoffrey Berman -- at Barr's request.

It's no coincidence that Berman is also the attorney who is investigating a number of Trump associates. **This isn't a clerical error -- it's a grave miscarrage of justice. And AG Barr is at the helm, yet again, sweeping President Trump's legal woes under the rug. We deserve an Attorney General who is interested in upholding the law, not acting as the President's personal lawyer.

**[It's time for action. Add your name to our petition demanding Barr's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d438/53d9897e/54b31770/1c884104/1713095177/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresignag")**

**This is far from the first time that Barr has put his loyalty to Trump ahead of the American people.** Barr directed the Justice Department to drop the criminal case against Donald Trump's first national security adviser Michael Flynn. Even after Mark Warner pressured the Administration to release intelligence proving that Flynn lied to the FBI and that he was under investigation for a very good reason, Barr continued to protect Donald Trump instead of pursuing justice.

Barr also ordered peaceful protesters to be forcibly cleared from in front of the White House -- all for a photo op for Donald Trump. Time and time again, U.S. Attorney General Barr has proven that he is more committed to protecting Trump than protecting the rule of law.

**Bottom line: Barr is unfit for office. His resignation is past due.**

**[Sign our petition demanding Barr's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d438/53d9897e/54b31770/1c884104/1713095177/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresignag")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
